landing.heroTitle: Compare building material prices across suppliers
landing.heroText: Materiaalitukku compares building material prices and freight to Finland — see instantly where ordering pays off.
landing.ctaSubmit: Are you a supplier? Add your products
landing.step1Text: Browse items by category or search by name.
landing.step2Text: See each supplier's unit price, wholesale price and freight to Finland — the true delivered price.
landing.step3Text: Contact the supplier and arrange transport, for example through our partners.

transport.title: Transport companies
transport.intro: Transport partners on routes from the Baltics and Europe to Finland.

submitForm.title: Add products
submitForm.intro: Are you a supplier? Send in your products and prices — an admin reviews them before publishing.
submitForm.transportSmall: Freight to Finland, small order (€, optional)
submitForm.transportBulk: Freight to Finland, bulk order (€, optional)
submitForm.submitted: Thank you! The product was submitted and will be published after review.
submitForm.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin — review queue
admin.approveNote: Approving automatically creates the supplier (matched by email), the product and the offer.
admin.duplicatesWarning: These product names appear more than once — merge submissions onto one of them instead of approving as new:
admin.backupNote: Downloads products, offers, suppliers, transport companies and categories as one JSON file.

footer.description: A direct price comparison platform connecting Finnish contractors and professionals with premier building material manufacturers from Estonia, Poland and Germany — eliminating intermediaries and cutting procurement costs.

portal.contactIntro: Send verified messages for the Materiaalitukku team and contractor desk to handle.
portal.messagePlaceholder: Write your inquiry, offer or price index change request here…
portal.verificationSentText: Confirm sending by clicking the button below:
portal.contactDoneText: Your message is secured and delivered directly to our specialist.
portal.priceIntro: Enter your email and pick the product whose contract price you want to change. An admin confirms the change before it goes live.
portal.noProductsForEmail: No products are registered under this email.
portal.priceDoneText: The price change request is registered. Once an admin approves it, the new price appears in the comparison.
portal.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address for verification.
portal.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

adminTrans.title: Translation management
adminTrans.intro: All site texts register here automatically from the Finnish base. Missing languages fall back to Finnish until translated.
adminTrans.aiNoKey: GEMINI_API_KEY is missing from .env.local — AI translation is disabled.
adminTrans.aiFailed: AI translation aborted due to an error — nothing was written to the database.
adminTrans.nothingMissing: All texts are already translated for this language.
adminTrans.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hinta.noMatchesHint: Loosen the filters or change the search to see products.

hinnoittelu.heroText: Materiaalitukku.com is Finland's leading price comparison platform for professional B2B buyers. We take no commission — every deal and customer relationship goes directly to your company without intermediaries.
hinnoittelu.stat2Sub: All savings to the customer and you
hinnoittelu.stat4Sub: Quote requests straight to your inbox
hinnoittelu.why1Text: Professionals visiting our site are looking for large order batches, full truckloads (FTL) and partial loads (LTL) of timber, metal and insulation, needing reliable material from European partners.
hinnoittelu.why2Text: When you register your factory or products, buyers automatically see delivery costs across Finland. As a transport company you get route orders directly from this integrated search!
hinnoittelu.why3Text: Register as a partner, fill in your details below and send the application. Admin verifies the details, after which you get update credentials for price editing.
hinnoittelu.cardA3: Own update credentials for price changes
hinnoittelu.cardB1: Own card on the Suppliers page
hinnoittelu.cardB2: Direct link to your quote request
hinnoittelu.cardC1: Visibility in the Transport routes menu
hinnoittelu.cardC2: Pinned FTL price for Finnish buyers
hinnoittelu.cardC4: Listing of service freight types (LTL, Mega)
hinnoittelu.formIntro: Fill in your details on the right and send the application. Admin processes the registration and contacts you about payment and publishing.
hinnoittelu.emailNotVerified: ⚠️ Email is not verified yet! Send the verification link and click it.
hinnoittelu.success: Payment completed and published! Your company is now linked and stored in the database. Admin finalises the publication.
hinnoittelu.submitProductHint: You can also add a single product directly with the form:

kuljetus.langBar: Click on a flag to change the page language:
kuljetus.heroTitle: Transport Companies from Europe to Finland
kuljetus.adText: This is meant for businesses who want to advertise their transport company to the Finnish market!
kuljetus.categoriesTitle: B2B Logistics Service Categories Explained for the Buyer
kuljetus.ftlText: The entire truck is reserved for a single customer (typically approx. 24 tons / 33 pallet spaces). By far the most economical and fastest solution for bulk structural materials (timber, insulation, bricks) brought directly from the factory to the site.
kuljetus.ftlOptimal: Optimal for: full trucks & large orders
kuljetus.ltlText: Cargo space is shared with other freight shipments. You only pay for your reserved pallet spaces or cubic meters in road transport. An excellent and flexible choice for medium-sized orders (e.g., 1–5 pallets) where a full truck is not required.
kuljetus.expressText: Extremely fast delivery on a direct route without stops or transit terminals. Delivered with a dedicated van, small truck, or special logistics. Perfect for critical construction site bottlenecks or urgent shortages.
kuljetus.noCompanies: No transport companies with this filter.

toimittajat.heroText: All partner suppliers are audited and offer direct B2B sales to Finnish companies. You can filter factories by geographical location or product category.
toimittajat.adText: This is meant for factories and suppliers who want to advertise their business to the Finnish market!
